name: wan-huiyan-overnight-workflows
description: Autonomous overnight workflows for client-facing delivery and insight discovery — multi-agent review panels baked in.

plugins.name: overnight-insight-discovery
plugins.description: Overnight autonomous B-vs-C parallel insight discovery that surfaces genuinely ah-ha findings from data, with cohort-conditional novelty gate, adaptive tuning, and agent-review-panel loop.

plugins.name: overnight-review-client-delivery
plugins.description: Overnight autonomous work session that produces a polished client delivery package by morning, with an 8-agent review panel to catch factual errors before they reach the client.
